# _UNRESOLVED_LINKS.md

**Generated by:** validator (to be built)  
**Last run:** never — validator not yet implemented  
**Status:** placeholder

This file will be auto-generated by the validator script on every run. Do not edit by hand.

When the validator is implemented (Phase 4), this file will contain:

- Broken `cross_domain` links (target file does not exist)
- Broken `related` links (target file does not exist in the same tree)
- Ambiguous links (multiple possible targets)
- Fuzzy-match suggestions for near-miss paths

Entries will be grouped by source article for easy triage.

Until the validator is built, this file is empty.
